label: Linear shear flow alone does not stabilize m=1 kink across realistic Z-pinch profile classes

provenance.source_span: RESEARCH ARTICLE | DECEMBER 17 2020 Eigenmode analysis of the sheared-flow Z-pinch  J. R. Angus  ; J. J. Van De Wetering ; M. Dorf ; V. I. Geyko Phys. Plasmas 27, 122108 (2020) https://doi.org/10.1063/5.0029716  

strengths: Strong modern comparator showing shear-only linear ideal MHD does not stabilize m=1 in tested profiles.
weaknesses: The tested profiles may omit the Atlas H3 quartic/helical ingredient, so the negative result should be scoped.
